title: What You Need to Know About FIGS Q1 Earnings
text: AAII investment education article on FIGS Q1 2026 earnings highlighting key metrics for retail investor consideration. EPS beat of $0.03 vs $0.01 forecast demonstrates operational execution despite macro uncertainty. Revenue beat of $159.9M vs $152.48M forecast shows strong demand momentum. 28% revenue growth YoY represents significant acceleration from 2024-2025 period. Active customer growth 12% YoY to 3M milestone indicates improved customer acquisition. International growth 50% YoY shows geographic diversification. Gross margin stability at 67.7% reflects pricing power offsetting tariff headwinds. Key risks to monitor: tariff escalation, freight cost volatility, customer frequency sustainability. Key opportunities: international market penetration with 80%+ of global healthcare professionals outside U.S., omnichannel expansion, B2B TEAMS platform adoption.
